name: Shoply Spark
viewBoxPolicy: Keep masters proportional; export 16/24/32 only after optical review.

rules.reducedMotion: Render the final static frame with no scale or orbit animation.
rules.implementation: Use SVG/react-native-svg and Reanimated; do not add a Lottie runtime for these assets.
rules.semanticOverlays: Reaction, verified, and exploration colors are conditional overlays only; never bake them into the default Match or Link masters.
